data/maps/FortreeCity_Mart/text.inc.FortreeCity_Mart_Text_SuperRepelBetter: SUPER REPEL lasts a long time, and\nit gets the job done.\pIt's much better than an ordinary\nREPEL.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Mart/text.inc.FortreeCity_Mart_Text_StockUpOnItems: I always stock up on more items than\nI'm sure I'll need.\pYou never know what might happen.\nBetter to be safe than sorry!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Mart/text.inc.FortreeCity_Mart_Text_RareCandyMakesMonG: A RARE CANDY makes a POKéMON grow\nimmediately by one level.
